name: Ben Fogle: New Lives in the Wild
original_name: Ben Fogle: New Lives in the Wild
overview: Ben Fogle follows in the footsteps of various individuals, who against all odds, have willingly forsaken the luxuries and lifestyle of the modern world, for a less-than-ordinary life in the wilderness.
